subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in Tokyo | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-4781
body: Please note the launch stream in Tokyo has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-4781. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: delivery, drop-bears.
